body:
## What changed
Added three docs-only draft specifications under `docs/` for the first-layer PvE frontend/backend integration discussion:

- `docs/pve-resolution-and-action-protocol-draft.md`
- `docs/2026-05-08-pve-backend-state-machine-alignment.md`
- `docs/2026-05-08-pve-frontend-integration.md`

## Why
We wanted a reviewable spec PR before implementation so the team can align on protocol shape, backend state ownership, frontend integration boundaries, and execution order.

## Impact
This PR does not change runtime code. It defines the draft contract and implementation plan for:

- backend-owned hand / deck / discard state
- `resolution[]`-driven combat playback
- minimal Lobby / SkillSelect / GamePage integration boundaries
- phased backend and frontend implementation work

## Validation
- Confirmed only the three approved docs files are included in this branch
- No code changes or runtime behavior changes in this PR

## Notes for review
This is intended to stay as a draft PR for discussion and specification review before implementation starts.

reviews.body: LGTM, docs-only spec draft, good foundation for Step 5.
LGTM, docs-only spec draft, good foundation for Step 5.

title: [docs] PvE integration spec drafts
